content: Backend: config env vars (LinkedIn Jobs API + VAPID/push contact)
Backend: services/push.py (VAPID keygen, subscriptions, send_push) + services/notify.py shared notifier
Backend: routes/push.py (public-key, subscribe, unsubscribe, test) + mount in server.py
Backend: services/reindex.py (baseline-first continuous re-index) + scheduler job wiring
Backend: services/skills/jobs_provider.py (LinkedIn/JSearch + mock) + jobs.py search/save + routes
Backend: wire scheduler._notify -> shared notifier (push), server startup vapid init
Test backend (testing_agent): push, reindex, jobs search/fallback, clean-slate gating
Frontend: public/sw.js service worker + src/lib/push.js helper
Frontend: Jobs page search UI (keywords/location, results, save, sample banner)
Wipe all non-demo accounts (clean-slate script) for fresh user test
